headline: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Reported Robust Organic Growth in Q1
summary: Madison Investments, an investment advisor, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Madison Mid Cap Fund”. The Madison Mid Cap Fund (Class I) declined 4.28% in the quarter, compared to the Russell Midcap Index’s 1.29% return. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. headline: Teledyne FLIR OEM Launches Prism Ground ISR Software for Tactical Perception and Military Target Classification
summary: GOLETA, Calif., June 30, 2026--Teledyne FLIR OEM announced Prism™ Ground ISR, a mission-ready software stack for ground-based intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR). Building on the recently announced Prism C-UAS for aerial drone threats, Prism Ground ISR brings advanced computational imaging and AI-driven perception to ground platforms, enabling rapid detection, classification and tracking of diverse targets including specific military vehicle classes.

headline: Here's What to Expect From Teledyne Technologies’ Next Earnings Report
summary: Teledyne Technologies is expected to announce its second-quarter earnings soon, and Wall Street expects the company’s EPS to rise by double digits.
